payload.input_str: {'sql': "SELECT c.CountryName, COUNT(DISTINCT cm.Id) AS ManufacturerCount FROM car_makers cm JOIN countries c ON cm.Country = c.CountryId JOIN continents cont ON c.Continent = cont.ContId WHERE cont.Continent = 'Europe' GROUP BY c.CountryName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT cm.Id) >= 3;"}
